message:
test(P2.10): fail-open / error-mode integration tests — 16 scenarios

Malformed JSON (8 variants: not-json, incomplete brace, null, array,
missing tool_input, null tool_input, non-string command types), empty
stdin, truncated JSON, oversize stdin (>256 KiB), oversize command
(>64 KiB), wrong-type turn_id, binary garbage (7 payloads), and
cross-protocol missing-command parity.

Every scenario asserts exit 0 (fail-open), empty stdout, no panic
backtrace on stderr. Oversize tests additionally verify the
"exceeds limit" warning message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
